title: PM Modi Invokes Ancient Sanskrit Prayer At 12th International Yoga Day Event In Kolkata | News18
description: "सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः, सर्वे सन्तु निरामयाः" — Prime Minister Narendra Modi invokes the ancient Sanskrit prayer for universal happiness and good health while addressing the nation during International Yoga Day celebrations at Kolkata's Red Road.

title: Why ancient yoga is the modern stress buster
description: Discover how ancient yoga calms the nervous system, eases stored tension and offers a free, science-backed remedy for modern stress and burnout.
